reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de su personal, tengo una discapacidad y me solucionaron rápidamente un inconveniente que tuve, al ir con turno, el tiempo de permanencia en el lugar es corto

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from their staff. I have a disability and they quickly resolved a problem I had. Since I had an appointment, the time I spent there was short.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURIX3JIQnJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Después nos quejamos de cómo está el país,lamentablemente es lo que merecen algunos como por ejemplo el playero que sin importarle mi tiempo no solo que me dejó esperando 15 minutos para cargar ,sino que le cargó a otro auto que llegó después de mi,dándome como repuesta que al no le importaba mi tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Then we complain about how the country is, unfortunately that's what some people deserve, like the gas station attendant who, without caring about my time, not only made me wait 15 minutes to charge, but also charged another car that arrived after me, telling me that he didn't care about my time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURIcE9HLVN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Llovía y hacia frío. Pedí un café y también estaba frío, la media luna era del día anterior.
Pagué $4000. No lo recomiendo, al menos para tomar café.

(Translated by Google)
It was raining and cold. I ordered a coffee, and it was cold too; the croissant was stale.
I paid $4000. I don't recommend it, at least not for coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIOFpqR3lnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo empleados laburan a media máquina..boludean mucho, uno quiere cargar nafta e irse, no quedarse a vivir
Para ir al baño es una odisea, tenés q encontrar a la persona que tiene la llave para que te abra, sino no podes entrar

(Translated by Google)
The employees are half-hearted...they goof off a lot; you just want to fill up your tank and leave, not stay and live there. Going to the bathroom is an ordeal; you have to find the person with the key to let you in, otherwise you can't get in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3OEluVUJREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros, el chico del lavadero muy amable me explicó todo sobre el cambio de aceite, voy a llevar mí auto muy pronto!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants, the guy at the car wash was very friendly and explained everything to me about the oil change. I'll be taking my car in very soon!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiaF9TZVhBEAE
